name: Manicotti Florentine
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chopped frozen spinach, thawed and drained well
2 tablespoons Fresh basil, torn into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cook noodles according to directions. Drain, then transfer to a pan of cold water.
3. Add 2 tablespoons olive oil to prevent sticking (I added this while cooking).
4. Combine remaining ingredients (except marinara sauce and reserved cheese) in a medium bowl and mix well.
5. Pour 2 cups marinara sauce into a 9x13 pan (or glass).
6. Pat excess water from the shells, fill with cheese mixture and spinach, then lay them in the pan.
7. Pour remaining sauce over the shells and sprinkle with reserved cheese.
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes uncovered. (Note: I omitted egg and salt but increased Ricotta cheese to 2 cups and Mozzarella cheese to 2 cups in the bowl - needed to fill 12 shells.)
